title: centranthus angustifolius var. lecoqii
intro: Centranthus angustifolius var. lecoqii, also known as Le Coq's centranthus, is a variety of flowering plant in the valerian family (Valerianaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Centranthus angustifolius var. lecoqii is typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water, although other preparations may also be used in traditional medicine.
